titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 105: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 105. (A.R. No. 112 of 1926.) TIRUVIḶAKKUḌI, MAYURAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Maṇavāḷēśvara temple.

p.hi: Year 12: Kumbha, Monday, Tiruvōṇam = 983 A.D., February 12.

summary.p: It records that the peruṅguṟi-pperumakkaḷ of Viḍēlviḍugu-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam in Kurukkai-nāḍu, on the northern bank (of the river Kāvēri) received the necessary amount and exempted from taxes on two plots of land endowed by Ayyaṉ Mārasiṅgaṉ alias Vīrasēkhara Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Guṇamalappāḍi in Nallāṟṟurnāḍu. One of the plots was meant to defray the expenses on maintaining a perpetual lamp for the god Tiruvēḻvikkuḍi Mahādēvar. It had been purchased by him after paying gold, from a person called, Kūvaṇḍūr Gōtamachchaturvēdi. The other plot had been purchased from Pāgaḷūr Tiruvaraṅga kramavittan and endowed for arranging to bring 15 pots of water from the Kāvēri river for the ablutions of (the same god).
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 312.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 2Āvatu vaṭakarai
kuṟukkai ṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam viṭelviṭukudevacaturvedi maṅkala
ttup peruṅkuṟipperumakkaḷom Ivvāṇṭu kumbha nāyiṟṟut
tiṅkaṭ kiḻamai peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāṉṟu I
vūr maṇṭapattey peruṅkuṟi Iruṉtu nallāṟṟū
r nāṭṭu kuṇamalappāṭik kuṇamalappāṭiyuṭaiyā
ṉ Ayyaṉ māra ciṅkaṉāṉa viracekara mu
ventaveḷāṉ tāṉ poṉ kuṭuttu vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nilam Iv
vūr mi melaip paruttivāykkāliṉ miy ciṟakil Ivaṉ kuvaṇṭur
gotamaccaturvedi pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiya ṉilam Iraṇṭu mā tiruve
ḻvikkuṭi mahādevarkku candrāditavat tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟum Ivaṉe parameśva
ravāykkāliṉ miyciṟakiṟ pākaḷūr tiruvaraṅkakramavittaṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiya ṉilam mākāṇiyum I
devarkkut tirumañcaṇamaḷikkum patiṉaiñcu kalam kāveriyiṉiṉṟu koṭuvantaṭṭak kaṭavatāka kuṭutta ṉila
mmāka ṉilam muṉṟu mākkāṇiyālum vanta Iṟaikku meppeṟpaṭṭataṟkum candrādittavat Iṟaiyiliyā
ka Ivaṉ pakkal dravyaṅ koṇṭu Iṟaiyiḻicci Iṟaiyiliceytu kuṭuttom sabhaiyom Itu paṉ
māheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 105 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
